mapper.select: SELECT PROVINCE_NO , PROVINCE_NAME , LOCAL_NO FROM PROVINCE ORDER BY PROVINCE_NO

SELECT PROVINCE_NO , PROVINCE_NAME , LOCAL_NO , (SELECT SUM(CITY_POPULATION) FROM CITY WHERE PROVINCE_NO = #{provinceNo} GROUP BY PROVINCE_NO) AS totalPopulation , (SELECT SUM(CITY_AREA) FROM CITY WHERE PROVINCE_NO = #{provinceNo} GROUP BY PROVINCE_NO) AS totalArea FROM PROVINCE JOIN CITY USING(PROVINCE_NO) WHERE PROVINCE_NO = #{provinceNo}
SELECT PROVINCE_NO , PROVINCE_NAME , CITY_NO , CITY_NAME , LOCAL_PRODUCT , HOT_PLACE FROM PROVINCE JOIN CITY USING(PROVINCE_NO) WHERE PROVINCE_NO = #{provinceNo}
